direction.narrative: Open quiet, build through product demonstration, resolve with brand confidence
direction.tone: Confident but not aggressive. Let the product speak. Restraint is the design.

brand.palette_note: Dark navy (#111827) backgrounds, warm grey-white (#f3f4f6) text, indigo (#6366f1) accents. No pure white. No pure black.
brand.typography_note: Inter or equivalent geometric sans. Weight 300 for display (taglines), 500 for UI labels, 600 for headings. Never bold (700+) for taglines — confidence whispers.
brand.surface_note: Card surfaces: 3.5% white opacity. Borders: 6-8% white. Elevated panels: #1f2937 solid. Shadows: deep but diffuse (32px blur, 50% black). Pill-shaped inputs: 28px radius.

panels.intent: Set the tone. Quiet confidence. Earn attention, don't grab it.
panels.description: Single tagline centered on dark field. No decoration. Just type and space. The restraint IS the design.

visual_direction.composition: Dead center, both axes. Generous negative space — the text should feel like it's floating in an ocean of dark navy.
visual_direction.typography: 38px, weight 300, letter-spacing -0.02em, line-height 1.2. Warm grey-white (#f3f4f6) on navy (#111827).
visual_direction.color: Two colors only. Background navy. Text warm white. Nothing else exists.
visual_direction.reference: Mercury 'Clarity takes craft.' — study the restraint. No gradient, no glow, no animation flair. Just perfect type on perfect space.

motion_notes.entrance: Fade in over 400ms, ease-out. Opacity only — no translate, no scale. The text appears as if it was always there.
motion_notes.hold: Static for 2s. Let the audience read. Respect their time.

panels.intent: Show the AI generating actionable insights. This is the product moment — make the audience want this.
panels.description: Three insight cards stack vertically, each revealing a financial trend with a directional icon. Cards are dark surfaces with subtle borders — the content is the hero, the chrome is invisible.

content.title: 12% revenue growth
content.detail: Q3 to Q4 revenue increased from $12,459 to $12,950

visual_direction.composition: Cards centered horizontally, vertically centered as a group. Max width 560px. 14px gap between cards. Each card is a self-contained unit — no visual dependency on its neighbors.
visual_direction.typography: Trend icon: 15px, semantic color (green for up, slate for neutral/down). Title: 15px weight 600, full white. Detail: 13px weight 400, 55% opacity. Line-height 1.5 on detail text.
visual_direction.color: Card background: rgba(255,255,255,0.035). Border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06). No hover states, no gradients. Green: #34d399. Slate: #94a3b8.
visual_direction.surfaces: Border radius: 14px. Padding: 18px vertical, 24px horizontal. No shadow on cards — they float by contrast alone.
visual_direction.reference: Mercury insight cards — notice how cards don't compete. Equal visual weight, simple stack. The trend icon is small (15px) — it's a signal, not a decoration.

motion_notes.entrance: Container enters with translateY(16px→0) + opacity, 400ms expo-out. Camera begins gentle push_in after entrance settles.
motion_notes.choreography: Cards appear as a unit (single container entrance), not individually staggered. The content inside each card is visible immediately — no reveal sequencing within cards.
motion_notes.hold: Cards visible for ~3s. Camera continues slow push_in through hold.

panels.intent: Show the conversational interface. The user asks a natural language question. Make it feel effortless.
panels.description: A chat input field appears center-screen with text already typed: 'Tell me more about: Increased software spend.' Purple submit button is the only color accent.
panels.content: Tell me more about: Increased software spend.

visual_direction.composition: Input field centered both axes. 580px max width. Nothing else on screen. The isolation emphasizes the simplicity of the interaction.
visual_direction.typography: Input text: 15px weight 400, full white. Placeholder (if visible): 35% white. The text should feel typed, not placed.
visual_direction.color: Input bg: rgba(255,255,255,0.05). Border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08). Submit button: #6366f1 circle with white ↵ icon. Upload icon: 30% white, 16px.
visual_direction.surfaces: Input: 28px border radius (pill). 14px vertical, 20px horizontal padding. Submit button: 34px circle. No shadow on input.
visual_direction.reference: Mercury prompt input — one input, one action, white space everywhere. The submit button is the only color.

motion_notes.entrance: Input field enters with scale(0.97→1) + translateY(20→0) + opacity, 500ms expo-out.
motion_notes.interaction: Text appears as if typed. cd-typewriter at ~40ms/char, starting 600ms after input appears.
motion_notes.exit: Hard cut to drilldown panel. Intentional — the AI responded instantly.

panels.intent: The AI delivered. Show the answer: a rich data panel with a bar chart. This is the peak — the moment that sells the product.
panels.description: An elevated panel showing the drilldown response. Header with close/action controls. Explanatory text. Bar chart showing top 4 software vendors by spend. Input field at bottom to continue the conversation.

content.explanation: Your software spend increase was driven by these 4 vendors

visual_direction.composition: Elevated panel centered, 580px max width. Internal layout top-to-bottom: header bar (title + controls) → explanation paragraph → chart area (title + legend + bars + labels) → bottom divider → input field. 28px padding, 24px between major sections.
visual_direction.typography: Panel title: 17px weight 600. Controls: 16px, 30% opacity. Explanation: 13px weight 400, 50% opacity. Chart title: 13px weight 500, full white. Legend: 11px, 35% opacity. Bar labels: 11px, 50% opacity. Y-axis: 11px, 25% opacity. Input placeholder: 13px, 35% opacity.
visual_direction.color: Panel bg: #1f2937 (elevated surface). Border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08). Shadow: 0 32px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.5). Bar fill: rgba(255,255,255,0.15). Chart baseline: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06). Input submit: #6366f1 circle.
visual_direction.surfaces: Panel: 18px border radius. Bars: flex-based width, 4px top-radius. Chart area height: ~140px. Input: 28px radius pill. Bottom input same style as p_03 but smaller (12px padding).
visual_direction.reference: Mercury drilldown — the chart is simple. 4 bars, no gridlines, no animation flair. The data speaks. The header controls are barely visible (30% opacity) — they exist but don't compete.

motion_notes.entrance: Panel enters with scale(0.97→1) + translateY(20→0), 500ms expo-out. Camera push_in synced to panel settle.
motion_notes.choreography: Consider: should bars grow from baseline? Only if it doesn't distract from reading. Static bars may be more respectful of the content. Test both.

panels.intent: The conversation continues. Show this is an ongoing dialogue, not a one-shot. Create anticipation for the full reveal.
panels.description: Faded chart context above (connecting to previous panel), new input field below with second prompt. Visual continuity without visual competition.
panels.content: Show me my largest transactions overall in March

visual_direction.composition: Upper third: faded mini-bars (35% opacity, ~70px tall) as context residue. No labels, just the bar shapes. Lower center: input field same spec as p_03. Vertical space between chart residue and input: ~28px.
visual_direction.typography: Same as p_03. Prompt text fits on one line at 580px (check character count).
visual_direction.color: Chart residue bars: rgba(255,255,255,0.12). Input submit: rgba(99,102,241,0.6) — slightly dimmer than p_03 to avoid repetition.
visual_direction.reference: Mercury follow-up — the faded chart creates 'I was just here' continuity. Subtle, not explanatory.

motion_notes.entrance: Chart residue fades in first (400ms, ease-out). Input field enters with translateY(16→0) after 200ms delay. Text types after 800ms total.
motion_notes.exit: Hard cut to full dashboard. The transition should feel like a camera pulling back.

panels.intent: The big reveal. Pull back to show the full product. 'Oh, this is a real product.' Make the audience want to sign up.
panels.description: Camera pulls out from detail view to reveal the complete dashboard: left sidebar with navigation, main content with Insights page (tabs, stats, trends, bar chart). This is the most complex visual — it must look like a shipping product.

visual_direction.composition: Full-width 1920px. Sidebar: 200px wide, darker navy (#0f172a), border-right. Main: flexible, 24px top/bottom padding, 32px horizontal. Stats row at top, then trends text on left, bar chart on right (roughly 50/50 split). Every element earns its pixels.
visual_direction.typography: Brand name: 14px weight 600. Nav items: 12px weight 400, 40% opacity (except active: full white, weight 500). Badge: 10px on indigo-25% bg. Page title: 22px weight 600. Tab: 12px, active has 7% white bg. Stat label: 11px 40% opacity. Stat value: 26px weight 600 (primary), 17px weight 500 (secondary). Trend title: 13px weight 500. Trend detail: 12px, 40% opacity.
visual_direction.color: Sidebar bg: #0f172a. Sidebar border: rgba(255,255,255,0.06). Active nav bg: rgba(255,255,255,0.06). Tab active bg: rgba(255,255,255,0.07). Chart bars: #6366f1 (income) + rgba(148,163,184,0.3) (expense). Money Out stat: 45% opacity.
visual_direction.surfaces: Sidebar nav items: 7px radius, 7px/10px padding. Tabs: 7px radius, 5px/14px padding. Chart bars: 2px radius.
visual_direction.reference: Mercury full dashboard — this is not a wireframe. It's a rendered product UI. Font rendering, spacing, alignment, color consistency — every detail matters. If it doesn't look like a screenshot of a real app, start over.

motion_notes.entrance: Main content enters with translateY(16→0) + opacity, 400ms. Sidebar fades in 300ms later. Camera pull_out begins immediately.
motion_notes.choreography: The camera pull_out IS the animation. Don't over-choreograph elements — let the reveal do the work. The audience is processing visual density, don't add motion complexity on top.
motion_notes.hold: Full pull_out holds for 1.5s at widest view.
motion_notes.exit: Crossfade 600ms to closing tagline. Slow crossfade — let the dashboard linger.

panels.intent: Name the thing. Two confident statements. The product has proven itself — now claim the territory.
panels.description: Two-line tagline centered on dark field. First line names the feature. Second line describes the value proposition. Both lines same size — equal weight, twin declarations.
content: An intelligent view of your finances.

visual_direction.composition: Two lines stacked with 8px gap. Centered both axes. Same generous space as p_01. The visual rhythm echoes the opening — bookend structure.
visual_direction.typography: 40px, weight 300, letter-spacing -0.025em. Both lines identical styling — no hierarchy between them, just two declarations.
visual_direction.color: Same as p_01. Warm white on navy. Consistency is the point.
visual_direction.reference: Mercury 'Introducing Insights.' — periods, not exclamation marks. Declarations, not announcements. The punctuation choice reveals the brand character.

motion_notes.entrance: Both lines fade in together, 400ms ease-out. No stagger — they're one thought.

panels.intent: The brand statement. Maximum confidence in minimum words.
panels.description: Single tagline centered. Shorter, punchier. This is the line that sticks.

visual_direction.composition: Same as p_01. Dead center. Maximum space.
visual_direction.typography: 40px weight 300. Same as p_07. Consistency across all tagline panels.
visual_direction.reference: A period, not an exclamation mark. Confidence doesn't shout.

panels.intent: Brand lockup. The signature. Then silence. Let the brand sit.
panels.description: Logo mark and wordmark centered with legal disclaimer below. Clean, quiet, authoritative.

content.logo_mark: Abstract square with rounded corners, indigo fill at 50% opacity
content.disclaimer: Acme Finance is a technology company. Banking services provided through partner institutions.

visual_direction.composition: Logo group (mark + wordmark) centered, slightly above vertical center. Disclaimer centered below with 48px gap. The gap is important — the disclaimer is legally required but visually subordinate.
visual_direction.typography: Wordmark: 24px weight 400, letter-spacing 0.15em. Disclaimer: 11px weight 400, 25% opacity, max-width 600px. The wide tracking on the wordmark creates authority.
visual_direction.color: Logo mark: rounded-square container (1.5px border, 60% opacity white) with indigo (#6366f1) inner element at 50% opacity. Wordmark: full white. Disclaimer: barely visible.
visual_direction.reference: Mercury logo lockup — the logo doesn't try to impress. It's there, quietly confident, with legal below in near-invisible type.

motion_notes.entrance: Logo group fades in 600ms ease-out. Disclaimer fades in after 400ms delay — arrive separately but settle together.
motion_notes.hold: Hold until end. No exit transition. The video ends on the brand. The last frame is the logo.
